description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine zonm_2, and is implemented by a call to zonm_2. Use this API to reassign the buses and loads in a specified subsystem of the working case from their original zone to a designated zone. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = zonm(sid, all, status, iznew)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying reporting options. (input).

parameters.name: iznew
parameters.description: New zone to be assigned to specified buses and/or loads. iznew must be between 1 and 9999. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: zone assignments of buses to IZNEW (0 by default).
don’t change zone assignments of buses to IZNEW.
change zone assignments of buses to IZNEW.
zone assignments of loads to IZNEW (0 by default).
Don’t change zone assignments of loads to IZNEW.
Change zone assignments of loads to IZNEW.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
zone table is full; cannot add zone to the working case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
